synopsis: Blu-ray bundled with a special edition of the 18th volume of the manga adapting the Yomi to Shittou to Tanjoubi and Iana to Sol Netsuppoi Tsuitachi stories.

title: Slay The Gods
titleNative: 斩神之凡尘神域
synonyms: หน่วยเทพล่าอสูร
synopsis: It follows the journey of Lin Qiye, a blind high school student who unexpectedly becomes a night watchman, tasked with protecting the nation from "mystical" invasions as the mist descends and gods reawaken. Leading his team, he tirelessly eliminates mythical creatures that emerge in modern society and eventually sets out on the path of god-slaying, evolving from guarding his small family to defending the nation.

title: Ys II: Castle in the Heavens
titleRomaji: Ys: Tenkuu no Shinden - Adol Christine no Bouken
titleEnglish: Ys II: Castle in the Heavens
titleNative: Ys (イース) 天空の神殿 アドル=クリスティンの冒険
synopsis: Now that Adol Christen has saved the land of Esteria from the evil priest Dark Fact, Adol and the two priestesses travel to the floating land of Ys, where evil has an even greater influence on the people and no one has hope. The future of Ys falls to Adol, heir to the powers of the priests and the only one who can show the people of Ys the truth about their world. But, as Adol's power grows, he may be the one who will save Ys -- or destroy it.

title: A Ripple in Time
titleNative: A Ripple in Time
synonyms: "A Ripple in Time" by Pokémon × Daniel Arsham
synopsis: Daniel Arsham × Pokémon collabrative animation. This animated short is directed by Kunihiko Yuyama (chief director of the original Pocket Monsters anime) and was initially shown off at Daniel Arsham's "A Ripple in Time" art exhibition in Tokyo. Note: A minute-long preview was previously released on January 27, 2022 in Pokemon's official YouTube channel.

title: Gegege no Kitarou (2007)
titleNative: ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (2007)
synopsis: The classic tale of Gegege no Kitaro told yet again. The story is the usual in the Gegege no Kitaro series. Kitaro is a boy living in the Gegege Forest/Cemetery (lands where many Yokai roam) with his mostly dead father (who survives only in his eye), Sunakake Babaa, NekoMusume, and Konaki Jiji. One difference between this Kitaro and all of the others that came before him, is that this one has brown hair instead of the standard grayish silver.

title: Pikachu no Fushigi na Fushigi na Daibouken
titleRomaji: Pikachu no Fushigi na Fushigi na Daibouken
titleNative: ピカチュウのふしぎなふしぎな大冒険
synonyms: Pocket Monsters: Pikachu's Really Mysterious Adventure
synopsis: While being let out to play by their trainers, Pikachu and Piplup wind up separated from their Pokémon friends and wind up travelling with a Skitty into a strange dimension, unknowingly followed by Croagunk, Team Rocket's Pokémon and a Marill that's desperate to have someone hear her sing... (Source: Bulbapedia)

title: Strike World: Deadverse Reloaded the Anime
titleEnglish: Strike World: Deadverse Reloaded the Anime
titleNative: モンスターストライク　デッドバースリローデッド
synopsis: Rinne is a girl who cannot see other people's faces. Born into a family whose job it is to exorcise supernatural beings, she sets out on her first mission, but encounters an enemy of a different nature than she expected, and finds herself in peril. After being saved by a mysterious man named Jugemu, Rinne learns that all worlds, including the one she lives in, known as "Strike Worlds," are under threat. As she travels through a number of ending worlds with Jugemu, the girl forms a bond with him...
hashtag: #モンスト #モンストアニメ #デドリロ

title: Horizon in the Middle of Nowhere XXI-PV
titleEnglish: Horizon in the Middle of Nowhere XXI-PV
titleNative: 境界線上のホライゾン
synonyms: Horizon In the Middle of Nowhere Special
synopsis: The official website of the Kyoukaisenjou no Horizon (Horizon in the Middle of Nowhere) anime announced on June 11 that a Blu-ray Box containing both seasons of the series will go on sale on December 21, 2018. The bundle will also include a new special anime created especially for this release. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Sousou no Frieren: ●● no Mahou Part 3

titleNative: 葬送のフリーレン ～●●の魔法～ 3クール
synonyms: Sousou no Frieren 2nd Season Mini Anime
Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Season 2 Mini Anime
Sousou no Frieren: Marumaru no Mahou
synopsis: A third batch of the ●● no Mahou shorts released alongside the airing of the TV anime's second season, starting with #18. Posted on the official YouTube account of TOHO animation, Frieren Twitter, and Frieren TikTok account. Includes: • Mita Mono wo Kousoku Suru Mahou (見た者を拘束する魔法), released Jan 19, 2026. • Doushin ni Kaeru Mahou (童心に還る魔法), released Feb 2, 2026. • Kokoro to Karada ga Irekawaru Mahou (心と体が入れ替わる魔法), released Feb 17, 2026. • Osentaku no Mahou (お洗濯の魔法), released Mar 2, 2026. • Kangaeteiru Koto wo Itte Shimau Mahou Sono Ni (考えていることを言ってしまう魔法その2), released Mar 16, 2026.

title: Qi Refining for 3000 Years
titleNative: 炼气练了3000年
synonyms: I Have Refined Qi For 3000 Years!
My Three Thousand Years To The Sky
synopsis: At the age of seventeen, Bai already reached level ten of the Qi Refining stage, just about to breakthrough. What a genius! Three thousand years later, Bai has already reached level 66,66a of Qi Refining… yet… there’s still no sign of breaking through at all. From Grandmaster to “Grand-Monster”, he can still be a bad*ss even when stuck on the newbie stage for three thousand years! (Source: Mangatoon)

title: Pikachu no Kirakira Daisousaku!
titleNative: ピカチュウのキラキラだいそうさく！
synonyms: Pocket Monsters: Pikachu no Kirakira Daisousaku
synopsis: Summer! Everyone is full of energy today. Pikachu and friends play with their beach ball! Pikachu and Pochama are chasing and diving in a river when they drift over and see a metropolis. "Where are we?" they said, searching from the rooftops of the buildings. Suddenly, with a bang, jagged-eared Pichu and Muchul collide. The two argue in an angry mood. "Sparkling is gone! It was the present to give to Kireihana..." Besides, today is her birthday!? This is troublesome! We must hurry and search. Moreover, Nyarth-tachi are aiming too! Thus, the Great Sparkling Search begins! (Source: Pocketmonsters)

titleNative: ピカチュウ 氷の大冒険
synonyms: Pocket Monsters: Pikachu Koori no Daibouken
synopsis: While playing in the ocean near a tropical resort, Pikachu & Co. get in a scuffle with Team Rocket's Pokémon. This scuffle causes the Pokémon to wind up miles away in an Ice-covered Paradise. However, when they get there, they are seperated soon find that certain Pokémon in the area require their assistance. Will they be able to reunite with their friends and help these Pokémon out? (Source: Serebii)

synopsis: Ange is now trapped in the Seijuu Universe, and cannot leave until she awakens Seijuu's Queen. In order to do this, she must gather nine new guardians. It sounds like a fairly simple task, but how can she convince these men to tear away from their own lives and protect the life of another?

titleNative: 大賢者リドルの時間逆行
synonyms: The Great Sage Riddle's Time Reversal
การย้อนเวลาของมหาปราชญ์ริดเดิล
synopsis: The story follows Riddle, a young man who lost his companions to a mysterious group known as the "Box of Malice." On the brink of despair, after 1,000 years, Riddle eventually achieves the ability to reverse time. With a thousand years of knowledge and experience, the Great Sage Riddle journeys to the past. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: The Wings of Rean
titleNative: リーンの翼
synopsis: Because his friends fired a rocket into the US Army camp, Suzuki was wanted by the US Army and the police. While he was running away the sea surface suddenly rose, and when a brilliant light appeared he saw a strange looking battleship flying in the air. He was dumped into the sea and when he crawled onto the battleship there was a beautiful girl standing there. She said her name was Lyx, the princess of another world, and added, "My Father is Japanese, Shinjiro Sakomizu. Please help me, Suzuki." Based on the novel series by the Gundam creator Yoshiyuki Tomino. (Source: AnimeNfo)

title: Saint Beast: Seijuu Kourin-hen
titleNative: セイント・ビースト～聖獣降臨編～
synopsis: The seal which was imprisoning the fallen angels, Kirin no Yuda and Houou no Ruka, is broken and the two decide to get revenge on the God who had cast them to Hell by getting rid of the Heavens that had once been their home. Soon the guardian angels on Earth begin disappearing, and no one in Heaven can explain the happenings. But there is a sense of a vengeful animal spirit at work, and so the four Saint Beasts are called upon to investigate. The 4 Gods of Beasts attempt to rescue the guardian angels, as well as to find out what this evil animal spirit is... (Source: Wikipedia)
